title: 'I will sleep with fear': Romanians shaken after block of flats hit by drone
summary_full: A Russian drone hit a block of flats in Romania on Friday, causing a fire and injuring two people, Romanian officials say.
summary_public: A Russian drone hit a block of flats in Romania on Friday, causing a fire and injuring two people, Romanian officials say.
